title: The Boy Foretold by the Stars
original_title: The Boy Foretold By the Stars
overview: The Boy Foretold By The Stars is a romantic comedy movie about two senior high school boys who, through the help of a fortune-teller, find each other at an optional school retreat called Journey with the Lord.
